title: Audit the two installed skill packages and decide the rollback shape
detail: Compare each target folder's `SKILL.md` and `SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md`, identify which sibling files are template-only, and confirm which helper assets remain referenced by the plain markdown skill body.

title: Revert the two target installed skills to plain markdown form
detail: Replace the compiled claw-entry `SKILL.md` with the original fallback content for `brainstorming` and `dispatching-parallel-agents`, then remove claw-only assets that are no longer part of a plain skill package.

title: Verify the installed plugin state after rollback
detail: Re-list the two skill folders, inspect the resulting `SKILL.md` headers, and confirm the other installed superpowers skill folders remain present and untouched.

title: Close out the rollback round
detail: Record the rollback outcome, dispatch truth or ADR only if there is reusable generic guidance, and finish the claw plan cleanly.
